title: GIS Routing
subtitle: Orientação por linhas A-B para agricultura de precisão

parcel.label: Parcela
parcel.configureHint: Configure o acesso e as zonas em "Configuração de parcela"

equipment.label: Trator / Equipamento
equipment.unclassifiedHelp: These machines do not have a canonical role (tractor/implement). Review them in the Entity Wizard and assign the correct category.
equipment.noTurningRadius: Esta máquina não tem raio de viragem — introduza um ou configure-o no editor de entidades.

parameters.heading: Rumo (°)
parameters.couplingModelRigidHelp: Current computation is validated for rigid coupling.
parameters.couplingModelArticulatedNotSupported: Articulated mode is not supported yet in computation. Select rigid coupling.

vra.label: VRA
vra.externalPending: Upload an external file to use VRA prescription
vra.noZonesForParcel: No zones available for the selected parcel

errors.missingTurningRadius: Falta o raio de viragem da máquina. Introduza um ou configure-o no editor de entidades.

zoning.title: Zoneamento VRA
zoning.description: Gera zonas de gestão variável (VRA) com base em índices de vegetação.
zoning.selectParcelHint: Aceda a este módulo a partir de uma parcela no visualizador principal para gerar zonas de gestão variável.
zoning.numZonesHint: Serão criadas {{zones}} zonas com base nos valores do índice de vegetação selecionado.
zoning.noZones: Sem zonas geradas para esta parcela
zoning.noZonesHint: Clique em "Gerar Zonas VRA" para criar zonas de gestão variável.
zoning.generateError: Erro ao iniciar a geração de zonas
zoning.manualUrnHint: If set, overrides the dropdown selection for fetch/generate.
zoning.jobTimeout: No new zones were detected in time. Retry or check backend status.

validation.sdmGpsOffsets: Tractor GPS offsets (X/Y/Z) are missing in the Context Broker
validation.sdmImplementWidth: Implement effective width is missing (needed for spraying/fertilizing)
validation.sdmTrackWidth: Tractor track width is missing (recommended for tillage)
validation.sdmWheelbase: Tractor wheelbase is missing (recommended for tillage)
validation.sdmHitchOffset: Implement hitch offset X is missing (recommended for seeding)

operations.title: 4) Executed operations
operations.activeConflict: Another operation is already in progress ({{id}}). Close it before starting another.

trajectory.title: Trajectory alternatives
trajectory.hint: Compare swath headings. Apply selection to regenerate the stored plan with that variant.

patterns.noSaved: No saved routes for this parcel

pathfinding.pickPointA: Click point A on the map
pathfinding.pickPointB: Click point B on the map

panels.emptyState: Generate a route to see results
panels.emptyStateHint: Configure the pattern and press Generate

handoff.title: Continue on mobile
handoff.body: Open NKZ Mobile → Operations, run sync if needed, then Start session for this operation ID.

preview.selectParcelHint: Select a parcel in the left panel to start
preview.configureHint: Configure the pattern to see the preview
preview.savedHint: Route saved. Go to the unified viewer to see it on the 3D map.
preview.interactiveHint: Click a line to select it. Hover to identify it.

parcelConfig.saveError: Não foi possível guardar a configuração
parcelConfig.instructions: Clique no mapa para marcar o portão; desenhe polígonos para as zonas proibidas.
